description_long: This object consists of a dense cluster of tall, angular, and flat green leaves that fan outward from a central base, resembling a stylized or abstract plant. The leaves have a dark green coloration with lighter green and blueish streaks, giving them a textured, almost digital appearance. The edges of the leaves are sharp and geometric, lacking the natural curvature of real foliage, and the overall form is compact and upright. There is no visible pot or container at the base, and the plant appears to be a single, cohesive unit. The surface of the leaves is matte with a subtle sheen, and the coloration is consistent throughout. The design suggests a decorative, modern plant suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylized cluster of tall, angular green leaves with blueish streaks, arranged in a compact, upright form. The plant has a modern, abstract appearance with sharp edges and no visible pot.
description_view_0: Tall, pointed leaves fan outward with visible blueish streaks and sharp edges, showing the plant's dense, layered structure.
description_view_1: The leaves appear more tightly grouped, with the central leaves dominating the view and less visible separation between individual blades.
description_view_2: A balanced view of the plant, showing the symmetrical arrangement of the leaves and the full extent of the blueish streaks.
description_view_3: The leaves overlap more, with the tips of the leaves pointing forward and the plant appearing slightly more compact.
